mapper.select:
SELECT BRK.OCC_DT ,BRK.OCC_NO ,BRK.CONT_TBL_PK ,SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) AS GUBUN ,NVL(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_EXEC_3200' THEN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT),'NOT ECMT') FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCCNDT CNDT LEFT JOIN STOCCNHD CNHD ON( CNDT.EXEC_NUM = CNHD.EXEC_NUM) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = CNDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = CNDT.PR_SQ) WHERE CNHD.EXEC_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@EX')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,1) )
WHEN SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_BID' OR SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_BID_SEL' OR SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_BID_BATCH_SEND' OR SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_BID_BATCH_CLOSE' OR SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_NEGO' OR SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_BID_BATCH_PRC' THEN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT),'NOT ECMT') FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDHD BDHD ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE BDHD.BID_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@BID')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,1) AND BDHD.BID_CNT = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@BID')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,2) )
WHEN SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_CONT_4300' OR SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_CONT_4220' OR SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_CONT_4230' THEN NVL(REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@EC')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,1) ||'@@'||REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@EC')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,2),'')
WHEN SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'INV' OR SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_INV' OR SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_INV_BATCH_PRC' OR SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_AP_BATCH_PRC' THEN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT),'NOT ECMT') FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT LEFT JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON( PODT.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM) ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT) WHERE IVGH.INV_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@INV')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,1) )
WHEN SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_RFQ_BATCH_PRC' OR SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_RFX_BATCH_REQ' OR SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'QTA' THEN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT),'NOT ECMT') FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT LEFT JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD ON( RQDT.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = RQDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = RQDT.PR_SQ) WHERE RQHD.RFX_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@RQ')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,1) )
WHEN SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_PO_5200' THEN NVL(REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@PO')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,1),' ') ||'@@'||'0'
WHEN SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_SIGN' THEN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(SCTM.CONT_NUM_CNT),'NOT ECMT') FROM ( --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM CNHD SELECT MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_NUM_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCCNDT CNDT LEFT JOIN STOCCNHD CNHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( CNHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( CNDT.EXEC_NUM = CNHD.EXEC_NUM) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = CNDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = CNDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,3) UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM ECCT SELECT MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_NUM_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCECCT ECCT LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( ECCT.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT) WHERE SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,3) UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM PRHD SELECT MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_NUM_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT LEFT JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( PRHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( PRDT.PR_NUM = PRHD.PR_NUM) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = PRDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,3) UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM RQHD SELECT MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_NUM_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT LEFT JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( RQHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( RQDT.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = RQDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = RQDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,3) UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM CNHD SELECT MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_NUM_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCCNDT CNDT LEFT JOIN STOCCNHD CNHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( CNHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( CNDT.EXEC_NUM = CNHD.EXEC_NUM) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = CNDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = CNDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,3) UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDHD SELECT MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_NUM_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDHD BDHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( BDHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,3) UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDHD SELECT MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_NUM_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDHD BDHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( BDHD.RLT_APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,3) UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDHD SELECT MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_NUM_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDHD BDHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( BDHD.NEGO_APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,3) UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDES SELECT MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_NUM_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDES BDES LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( BDES.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDES.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDES.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,3) UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM POHD SELECT MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_NUM_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT LEFT JOIN STOCPOHD POHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( POHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM) ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT) WHERE SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,3) UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IVHD SELECT MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_NUM_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT LEFT JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( IVHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( IVGH.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM) ON( PODT.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM) ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT) WHERE SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,3) UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IVAP SELECT MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_NUM_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT LEFT JOIN STOCIVAP IVAP LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( IVAP.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( PODT.PO_NUM = IVAP.PO_NUM) ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT) WHERE SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,3) UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDES SELECT MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_NUM_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDES BDES LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( BDES.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( RQDT.RFX_NUM = BDES.BID_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = BDES.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = RQDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = RQDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,3) ) SCTM )
WHEN SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_ETST_REQ' THEN NVL(REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@EN')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,1) ||'@@'||REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@EN')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,2),'')
WHEN SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'AP' OR SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) = 'SMS_AP' THEN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(ECMT.CONT_NUM||'@@'||ECMT.CONT_CNT),'NOT ECMT') FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT LEFT JOIN STOCIVAP IVAP ON( PODT.PO_NUM = IVAP.PO_NUM) ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT) WHERE IVAP.AP_NUM = REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@AP')+2,LENGTH(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK)),'[^@@]+',1,1) ) END,' ') AS CONT_NUM_CNT FROM TB_PR_DM_FEE_OCC_BRK BRK WHERE BRK.OCC_DT BETWEEN #{FROMDATE} AND #{TODATE} AND BRK.CORP_NO IN ('2148206195','1028506404') AND BRK.COST != 0 AND BRK.EPRO_FEE_DSC = '03' AND BRK.BIGO IS NULL AND SUBSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,0,INSTR(BRK.CONT_TBL_PK,'@@')-1) NOT IN ( 'SMS_CTRL' ,'SMS_VEND' ,'SMS_VOC_CMPL' ,'SMS_VOC_REQ' ,'VC' ,'VEND' ,'SMS_PC_REQ' ,'SMS_PC_RJT' ,'SMS_TC_REQ' )
